TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Darrell_Arthur, title = Darrell_Arthur, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Darrell_Arthur} }

S.FORM: Darrell Arthur, unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput(NBAŤĀĮÁõü), u tabakiay ayaway mimaliay. Darrell Arthur i 2008 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 27, namapili' tu nu New Orleans Hornets putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 3 a bulad 25 a demiad, 1988 a mihcaan, Darrell Arthur, u miunduay nu kawaw niza.
S.PHON: darr…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ artńßur, unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput(nba**), u tabakiaj ajawaj mimar~…ĺiaj. darr…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ artńßur i **** a mińß ¶aan nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu n…ôw orr~…ĺ…ôans ńßorn…ôts putiput. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶iniza i * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶aan, darr…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ artńßur, u miunduaj nu kawaw niza.
S.FORM: Darrell Arthur, unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput(NBAŤĀĮÁõü), u tabakiay ayaway mimaliay. Darrell Arthur i 2008 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 27, namapili' tu nu New Orleans Hornets putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 3 a bulad 25 a demiad, 1988 a mihcaan, Darrell Arthur, u miunduay nu kawaw niza.
